description: This file defines the AppRoleRepository interface, which extends JpaRepository to provide CRUD operations for AppRole entities. It includes a custom method to find roles by their name.

classes.name: AppRoleRepository
classes.description: Repository interface for managing AppRole entities, extending JpaRepository for basic CRUD operations and including a custom finder method by role name.

methods.name: findByName
methods.description: Finds an AppRole entity by its role name, returning an Optional of AppRole.
